summary.title: Online Banking Application Threat Model
summary.description: STRIDE threat model for an online banking application

data.name: Customer
data.description: End user accessing the bank via browser

data.name: SMS Gateway
data.description: Third-party service delivering OTP codes by SMS

data.name: Payment Gateway
data.description: External payment network e.g. SWIFT or Stripe

data.name: 1.0 Authentication Service
data.description: Handles login, password check, 2FA and session creation

data.name: 2.0 Account Management
data.description: Serves account balances, statements and personal details

data.name: 3.0 Transaction Processing
data.description: Handles fund transfers, payments and balance updates

data.name: 4.0 Admin Panel
data.description: Internal interface for bank staff to manage users and accounts

data.name: 5.0 Audit Logging Service
data.description: Records every sensitive action with timestamp and actor

data.name: DS1 User Accounts DB
data.description: Stores credentials, account numbers, balances and customer details

data.name: DS3 Session Store
data.description: Holds active session tokens for logged-in users

data.name: DS4 Audit Log DB
data.description: Append-only log of all sensitive actions
